docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF HEEWON PARK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NEIGHBOURGOOD PROPERTY SERVICE IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARK, HEEWON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEIGHBOURGOOD PROPERTY SERVICES INC. $5,310.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,475.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF V. DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,310.00 FILED BY PARK, HEEWON AS TO DEFENDANT NEIGHBOURGOOD PROPERTY SERVICES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-11-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $90.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NEIGHBOURGOOD PROPERTY SERVICES INC.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARK, HEEWON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-26-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON FEB 04, 2026. SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO NEIGHBOURGOOD PROPERTY SERVICES INC. RETURN TO SENDER -NO SUCH NUMBER- UNABLE TO FORWARD.
REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON FEB 11, 2026. SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO HEEWON PARK. (ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - REFUSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD )
